name: Phantom Needle
flavor: There's no blade in your hand. That doesn't stop the audience member three rows back clutching their arm.
description: You point at a creature you can see within range, and for one vivid instant it feels exactly what a blade sliding between its ribs would feel like. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}} or take [[1d6]] psychic damage, flinching from a wound that was never there. On a success, the target takes no damage.
sheetSummary: Action, 60 ft. Wisdom save vs trick save DC. Fail: [[1d6]] psychic damage. Success: no effect.
